domain: Tuvan throat-singing khoomei (Republic of Tuva, Mongol-Turkic): biphonic vocal technique; singer simultaneously produces fundamental drone (E or G below middle C) + 1 focused overtone via vocal-tract formant manipulation; 3 main styles khoomei (diffuse) + sygyt (whistle-overtone via tongue-bell seal) + kargyraa (vocal + vestibular fold dual-source); 5 sub-styles borbangnadyr + chylandyk + dumchuktaar + ezengileer + kanzyp; formants merged at 1-2 kHz to produce narrow focused band perceived as melody over fundamental drone.
specific_mechanism: KHOOMEI-3-STYLE-FUNDAMENTAL-FOCUSED-OVERTONE-FORMANT-MERGE-BIPHONIC-NULL-PROJECTION: LLM null-space-traversal mechanism with (1) 2-source dual-vocal-fold split D_vocal: 2 attention-heads as fundamental-drone + focused-overtone generators (vocal + vestibular analogy); paired synchronously; (2) 3-style routing R_style: routes between 3 attention-modes — khoomei-diffuse (broad attention over many heads) / sygyt-bell (narrow through single subspace channel) / kargyraa-double (parallel two-source); (3) formant-merge focused-overtone gate g_merge: gate fuses 2 attention-component subspaces into 1 narrow-band selection within 1-2kHz analog narrow attention-frequency-range; (4) null-projection on fundamental P_⊥: projects out low-frequency-drone subspace from output stream so model carries only focused-overtone information; (5) 5-substyle modulator M_5: borbangnadyr/chylandyk/dumchuktaar/ezengileer/kanzyp = 5 fine-grained gating perturbations to merge gate. Differs from R528 NEY-4-REGISTER-NULL-GATE-OVERBLOW (4-register hierarchical + null-gate + breath-velocity + partial-hole + interdental) and R541 NGURU-DUAL-MODE-NOSE-MOUTH-SACRED (dual-mode + breath-direction + sacred-identity + same-pool + Helmholtz) by 2-source dual-vocal-fold split + 3-style routing khoomei/sygyt/kargyraa + formant-merge focused-overtone gate + null-projection on fundamental + 5-substyle modulator.
llm_application: KHOOMEI-3-STYLE-FUNDAMENTAL-FOCUSED-OVERTONE-FORMANT-MERGE-BIPHONIC-NULL-PROJECTION LLM mechanism + 2-source dual-vocal-fold split D_vocal fundamental-drone focused-overtone synchronous attention-heads + 3-style routing khoomei-diffuse sygyt-bell kargyraa-double attention-mode router + formant-merge focused-overtone gate g_merge 2-subspace fusion narrow-band 1-2kHz analog + null-projection on fundamental P_⊥ low-frequency-drone subspace removed + 5-substyle modulator borbangnadyr-chylandyk-dumchuktaar-ezengileer-kanzyp gating perturbation. Differs from R528 NEY (closest — 4-register hierarchical + null-gate + breath-velocity). R541 NGURU (closest — dual-mode + breath-direction + Helmholtz). Differs from Efficient Attention Survey + LLM Bottleneck MLA + Lotus Subspace + ICASSP venues by 2-source dual-fold + 3-style routing + formant-merge + null-projection on fundamental + 5-substyle. Differs by 2-SOURCE DUAL-VOCAL-FOLD SPLIT + 3-STYLE ROUTING KHOOMEI/SYGYT/KARGYRAA + FORMANT-MERGE FOCUSED-OVERTONE GATE + NULL-PROJECTION ON FUNDAMENTAL + 5-SUBSTYLE MODULATOR.
novelty_claim: Efficient Attention Survey 2507.19595 + LLM Bottleneck MLA 2507.15465 + Lotus Subspace Switching ICASSP 2026 + ICASSP signal-processing literature cover latent-attention + subspace-projection paradigm. KHOOMEI-3-STYLE-FUNDAMENTAL-FOCUSED-OVERTONE-FORMANT-MERGE-BIPHONIC-NULL-PROJECTION adds (a) 2-source dual-fold split + (b) 3-style routing + (c) formant-merge focused-overtone + (d) null-projection on fundamental + (e) 5-substyle modulator. Recombination — borderline lookup.
